sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69536" key="muwci/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυ-ωξία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mouse-hole</tr_>, also a term of reproach, Id., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μυωνιά</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
